news.t: 13 Best Growth ETFs for a Rip-Roaring 2021

holdings.infoBox: NXTG is an equity ETF with a total of 109 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 3.68%, Marvell Technology at 2.95%, MediaTek at 2.87%, Intel at 2.79%, and Samsung Electronics at 2.74%.

overview.description: The First Trust Indxx NextG ETF (NXTG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Indxx 5G & NextG Thematic index. The fund tracks a tiered-weighted index of global equities related to next generation digital cellular technologies. NXTG was launched on Feb 17, 2011 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: 13 Best Growth ETFs for a Rip-Roaring 2021
data.text: These 13 growth ETFs allow investors to strive for hotter returns without overexposing themselves to one or two high-risk stocks.

data.title: Best Telecom ETFs for Q4 2020
data.text: The best telecom ETFs for Q4 2020 are NXTG, VOX, and IXP.
